name: Contacts FAQs
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can optimize your contact management strategy by understanding the differences between custom fields and tags, upload limits, and handling subscription status. A suitable contact organization helps ensure that your email campaigns reach the right audience segments while maintaining data quality and compliance standards."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Effective contact management enables more targeted email marketing by organizing subscriber data for better segmentation and personalization. When properly configured, a strategic contact organization can enhance campaign effectiveness by ensuring accurate data collection and subscriber status tracking throughout your Marketing Cloud account."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"bold": true, "text": "Q1) What is the difference between a \"Custom Field\" and a \"Contact Tag\"?"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Custom fields are mutually exclusive and overwrite the previous value; thus, they tend to make more sense for values that contacts can only have one of (e.g., birthday/first name). Tags can be stacked onto a user record and are good for showing interests or personality types."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"bold": true, "text": "Q2)"}, {"text": " "}, {"text": "How many custom fields can I have?", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "subscription", "bold": true}, {"text": ".\" Any blanks or \""}, {"text": "S", "bold": true}, {"text": "\" will be subscribed. \""}, {"text": "U", "bold": true}, {"text": "\" will be uploaded as
